Ad Nauseam.xmage_effect: AdNauseamEffect loops while controller chooses yes and library has cards. Each iteration moves top library card to hand, loses life equal to that card's mana value, then may repeat

Call Forth the Tempest.xmage_effect: Two CascadeAbility(false).setRuleAtTheTop(true) abilities before DamageAllEffect(CallForthTheTempestDynamicValue, opponent creatures); watcher excludes the source spell id from mana value total

Dragon's Rage Channeler.xmage_static: DeliriumCondition grants BoostSourceEffect(2,2), FlyingAbility, and AttacksIfAbleSourceEffect

Eldritch Evolution.xmage_effect: EldritchEvolutionEffect searches library for creature card with mana value sacrificedPermanent.getManaValue() + 2 or less

Force of Negation.alternate_cost_exile_blue_card_text: If it's not your turn, you may exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.

Formidable Speaker.etb_discard_creature_tutor_text: Optional discard on ETB: search library for a creature card, reveal it, put it into hand, then shuffle.

Giver of Runes.xmage_effect: SimpleActivatedAbility + TargetPermanent(FILTER_ANOTHER_CREATURE_YOU_CONTROL) + GiverOfRunesEffect choosing colorless or chosen color protection until end of turn

Kinnan, Bonder Prodigy.activated_top_five_nonhuman_creature_to_: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may put a non-Human creature card from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

Mana Drain.xmage_effect: ManaDrainCounterEffect counters target spell, records spell.getManaValue(), and creates AtTheBeginOfMainPhaseDelayedTriggeredAbility with AddManaToManaPoolTargetControllerEffect(Mana.ColorlessMana(cmc), your)

Thassa's Oracle.xmage_effect: EntersBattlefieldTriggeredAbility(ThassasOracleEffect) + DevotionCount.U + player.won(game) when devotion >= library size

Touch the Spirit Realm.xmage_effect: ChannelAbility {1}{W} with ExileReturnBattlefieldNextEndStepTargetEffect; ETB has ExileUntilSourceLeavesEffect with 0..1 artifact-or-creature target

Twinflame Tyrant.xmage_effect: TwinflameTyrantEffect replacement doubles DAMAGE_PLAYER and DAMAGE_PERMANENT when the source is controlled by Twinflame controller and target is an opponent or opponent-controlled permanent
